responsibility: Provide technology-specific, read-only access to configured lifecycle artifact formats and translate them into normalized evidence records, typed relationships, hashes, provenance, and structured diagnostics.

rules.text: Adapters never modify configured lifecycle artifacts.
Artifact extraction and hashing run locally.
Every failure is source-scoped, typed, and safe for audit history.

acceptanceCases.description: Read representative synthetic fixtures for every agreed extension.
acceptanceCases.expectedOutcome: Normalized identities, relationships, hashes, provenance, adapter versions, and deterministic counts match fixtures.

acceptanceCases.description: Attempt a refresh across read-only source files and cancel mid-read.
acceptanceCases.expectedOutcome: No source changes occur; cancellation and per-source diagnostics are explicit.
